problem id: 1dfb1f3d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHL(6)

examples:
  11110000 -> 01111000
  01110011 -> 01111001
  01000010 -> 10100001
  10111010 -> 11011101
  10101101 -> 10010110
  10011010 -> 11001101
  11010001 -> 10101000
  10011111 -> 00001111
  01001110 -> 10100111
  10100000 -> 01010000

query: 00001010
predicted answer: 10000101
